name: shipui
description: Opinionated web design and frontend playbook for Claude Code. Ships production-grade web UI with Next.js + Tailwind v4 + shadcn/ui + Motion.

plugins.name: shipui
plugins.description: Opinionated web design and frontend skill — ships production-grade web UI with Next.js + Tailwind v4 + shadcn/ui + Motion. Enforces a 10-step workflow with 5 non-negotiable QA gates. Auto-activates on any web/UI work via SessionStart hook.
